- `AGENTS.md`
- `biome.json`
- `CLAUDE.md`
- `compose.example.ai.yml`
- `compose.example.pipelock.yml`
- `compose.example.yml`
- `config.ru`
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- `Dockerfile`
- `Gemfile`
- `Gemfile.lock`
- `LICENSE`
- `Makefile`
- `package-lock.json`
- `package.json`
- `Procfile.dev`
- `Rakefile`
- `README.md`

## Entrypoints

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `.github/workflows/chart-ci.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/chart-release.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/ci.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/flutter-build.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/helm-publish.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/ios-testflight.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/mobile-build.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/mobile-ci.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/mobile-release.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/pipelock.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/pr.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/publish.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `.github/workflows/update-docs.yml` | GitHub Actions |
| `Dockerfile` | Docker build |
| `Gemfile` | Ruby dependencies |
| `Makefile` | Build commands |
| `Procfile.dev` | Development process manager |
| `Rakefile` | Entry point (Rakefile) |
| `app/controllers/application_controller.rb` | Base controller (auth, filters) |
| `app/models/account.rb` | Core domain: Account (delegated_type) |
| `app/models/application_record.rb` | Base model class |
| `app/models/current.rb` | Thread-local request context |
| `app/models/entry.rb` | Core domain: Entry (delegated_type) |
| `app/models/family.rb` | Core domain: Family (tenant/owner) |
| `app/models/sync.rb` | Sync engine state machine (AASM) |
| `config.ru` | Entry point (config.ru) |
| `config/application.rb` | Rails application config |
| `config/routes.rb` | Rails router (all URL -> controller mappings) |
| `package.json` | Node.js package config |

| `.yml` | 1031 |

| `.md` | 33 |

## Where to Look for X -- Router Table

| Task | Start Here |
|------|-----------|
| Add a new account type | `app/models/concerns/accountable.rb` (TYPES array), then create `app/models/{type}.rb` inheriting pattern from `app/models/depository.rb` |
| Fix bank sync / provider issue | `app/models/{provider}_item/syncer.rb` (e.g., `simplefin_item/syncer.rb`, `plaid_item/syncer.rb`) |
| Debug sync state machine | `app/models/sync.rb` (AASM states), `app/models/concerns/syncable.rb` (scheduling), `app/jobs/sync_job.rb` |
| Add/modify a transaction feature | `app/models/transaction.rb`, `app/models/entry.rb`, `app/controllers/transactions_controller.rb` |
| Change balance calculations | `app/models/account/syncer.rb`, `app/models/balance/syncer.rb`, `app/models/balance_sheet.rb` |
| Fix authentication / sessions | `app/controllers/sessions_controller.rb`, `app/models/current.rb`, `config/initializers/auth.rb` |
| Add a new API endpoint | `config/routes.rb` (api namespace), `app/controllers/api/v1/`, `spec/requests/api/v1/` (OpenAPI), `test/controllers/api/v1/` |
| Modify the dashboard | `app/controllers/pages_controller.rb` (dashboard action), `app/views/pages/dashboard/` |
| Change import flow | `app/models/import/`, `app/controllers/imports_controller.rb`, `app/controllers/import/` |
| Fix investment/holdings data | `app/models/holding/syncer.rb`, `app/models/trade.rb`, `app/models/security/` |
| Add/change background jobs | `app/jobs/`, `config/initializers/sidekiq.rb`, `sidekiq-cron` schedule in config |
| Modify rules engine | `app/models/rule/`, `app/models/rule/action_executor/`, `app/models/rule/condition_filter/` |
| Update UI components | `app/components/DS/` (design system), `app/components/UI/` (feature components) |
| Change styling / design tokens | `app/assets/tailwind/maybe-design-system.css`, `app/assets/tailwind/maybe-design-system/` |
| Fix multi-currency / exchange rates | `app/models/exchange_rate/`, `lib/money/`, `app/models/concerns/monetizable.rb` |

## Danger Zones

| File/Area | Why It's Fragile |
|-----------|-----------------|
| `db/migrate/` | 200+ migrations, order-dependent. Never rename or reorder. Always `bin/rails db:migrate`, never `db:schema:load` in production. |
| `app/models/sync.rb` + `concerns/syncable.rb` | AASM state machine with parent-child sync chains. Race conditions possible on concurrent syncs. Uses pessimistic locking (`with_lock`). |
| `app/models/entry.rb` | `delegated_type :entryable` polymorphism. Scopes like `pending` use raw SQL joins into `transactions` table. Changes here cascade to all entry types. |
| `app/models/account.rb` | `delegated_type :accountable` with 9 types. `classification` is a **generated DB column** (virtual/stored). Cannot be set via ActiveRecord. |
| `app/models/balance/syncer.rb` | Forward-fill balance calculation. Bugs here corrupt all historical balance data for the account. |
| `app/models/concerns/accountable.rb` | `TYPES` array is the registry for all account types. Adding/removing entries here affects the entire account system. |
| `config/routes.rb` | 500+ lines, complex nested resources. `direct :entry` and `direct :edit_account` use polymorphic routing magic. |
| `app/models/family.rb` | Central tenant model with 9 `Connectable` concerns mixed in. `investment_contributions_category` has race-condition handling. |
| `db/schema.rb` | Generated column `classification` on accounts table uses raw SQL CASE. Must match `Accountable::TYPES` exactly. |
| `app/models/transaction.rb` | `kind` enum controls budget inclusion/exclusion. `BUDGET_EXCLUDED_KINDS` vs `TRANSFER_KINDS` overlap is intentional but confusing. |
| `config/initializers/simplefin.rb` + `plaid_config.rb` | Env vars control pending transaction behavior. Wrong defaults break sync silently. |
